name: tool-call-display
description: Display tool calls from the AI SDK in the chat interface to show live progress. Use message.parts with typed tool parts (tool-{toolName}) and the state property (input-streaming, input-available, output-available, output-error) to render tool execution status. When Claude invokes Wavesmith tools (store.create, store.update), show the tool name, input parameters, and results in real-time.
